text_en: But when they came to Jesus, and saw that he was dead already, they brake not his legs :
text_haw: A hiki lakou io lesu la, a ike ae la, ua make loa ia, aole lakou i uhai aku i kona mau wawrae.

text_en: But one of the soldiers with a spear pierced his side, and forthwith came thereout blood and water.
text_haw: Aka, o aku la kekahi koa i kona aoao i ka ihe, a kahe ko- ke mai no ke koko a me ka wai.

text_en: And he that saw it, bare record and his record is true : and he knoweth that he saith true, that ye might believe,
text_haw: A o ka mea ike maka, hoi- ke aku la ia, a he oiaio kana ioike ana, a ua ike no ia, ke olelo pololei nei ia, i manaoio ai oukou.

text_en: For these things were done, that the scripture should be fulfilled, A bone of him shall not be broken.
text_haw: No ka mea, ua hanaia ke- ia mau mea, i ko ai ka palapala hemolele, Aole e uhaiia kekahi iwi ona.

text_en: And again another scrip- ture saith, They shall look on him whom they pierced.
text_haw: Ua olelo mai hoi ma keka- kahi palapala hemolele, E nana auanei lakou i ka mea a lakou i o aku ai.

text_en: Then she runneth, and com- eth to Simon Peter, and to the other disciple whom Jesus lov- ed, and saith unto them, They have taken away the Lord out of the sepolchre, and we know not where they have laid him.
text_haw: Nolaila, holo aku la ia a hi- ki io Simona Petero la, a me kekahi haumana a lesu i aloha ai, i aku la ia laua, Ua lawe aku lakou i ka Haku mai ka hale- kupapau aku, aole makou i ike

text_en: Peter therefore went forth, and that other disciple, and came to the sepulchre.
text_haw: Alaila, hele aku la o Petero a rne kela haumana, a hiki ma ka halekupapau.

text_en: So they ran both together : and the other disciple did out- run Peter, and came first to the sepulchre. 94
text_haw: i A ma ua wahi la, kahi i kauia'i oia ma ke kea, he mala, a maloko o ua mala la he hale- kupapau hou, aole i waihoia ke- kahi kanaka iloko.

text_en: And he stooping down, and looking in, saw the linen clothes lying ; yet went he not in.
text_haw: Kulou iho la ia, a ike ae la i ka lole olona, aole nae i komo iloko.

text_en: Then cometh Simon Peter following him, and went into the sepulchre, and seeth the linen clothes lie ;
text_haw: Alaila, hiki mai o Simona Petero e hahai ana rnahope ona, a komo iho la iloko o ka hale- kupapau, a ike aku la i ka lole olona e waiho ana.

text_en: For as yet they knew not the scripture, that he must rise again from the dead.
text_haw: No ka mea, ia manawa aole lakou i hoomaopopo i ka pala- pala hemolele e pono ke ala hou ia mai ka make rnai.

text_en: Then the disciples went away again unto their own home.
text_haw: Alaila hoi aku la na hau- mana i ko laua wahi iho.

text_en: IT But Mary stood without at the sepulchre weeping : and as she wept she stooped down and looked into the sepulchre,
text_haw: 1T Aka, ku ae la o Maria ma ka halekupapau mawaho e uwe ana. A i kona uwe ana kulou iho la i ka halekupapau,

text_en: And seeth two angels in white, sitting, the one at the head, and the other at the feet, where the body of Jesus had lain.
text_haw: A ike iho la i ria anela elua i kahikoia i ke kapa keokeo e noho ana ma ke poo kekam\ a ma ka wawae kekahi, ma kahi i waihoia'i ke kino o lesu.

text_en: And they say unto her, Woman, why weepest thou ? She saith unto them, Because they have taken away my Lord, and 1 know not where they have laid him.
text_haw: I mai la laua ia ia, E ka wahine, no ke aha la oe e uwe ai ? I aku la oia ia laua. No ka mea, ua lawe aku lakou i kuu Haku, aole au i ike i kahi i waiho ai lakou ia ia.

text_en: And when she had thus said, she turned herself back, and saw Jesus standing, and knew not that it was Jesus.
text_haw: Pau kana olelo ana ia mau mea, huli ae la ia ihope, a ike aku la ia lesu e ku ana, aole nae oia i ike, o lesu ia.

text_en: Jesus saith unto her, Mary. She turned herself, and saith unto him, Rabboni, which is to say, Master.
text_haw: I mai la o lesu ia ia, E Maria. Haliu ae la ia, i aku la ia ia, E Raboni, oia keia olelo, E ke Kumu.

text_en: Jesus saith unto her, Touch me not : for I am not yet as- cended to my Father : but go to my brethren, and say unto them, I ascend unto my Father and your Father, and to my God and your God.
text_haw: I mai la o lesu ia ia, Mai hoopa mai oe ia'u ; no na mea, aole au i pii aku i ko'u Makua : aka, e hele oe i ko'u poe hoa- hanau, e i aku ia lakou, E pii ana au i ko'u Makua, a i ko oukou Makua, a i ko'u Akua, a i ko oukou Akua.

text_en: Mary Magdalene came and told the disciples that she had seen the Lord, and that he had spoken these things unto her.
text_haw: Hele aku la o Maria no Magedala, a olelo aku la i na haumana, ua ike ia i ka Haku, a ua olelo mai oia i keia man rnea ia ia.

text_en: IF Then the same day at evening, being the first day of the week, when the doors were shut where the disciples were assembled for fear of the Jews, came Jesus and stood in the midst, and saith unto them, Peace be unto you.
text_haw: 1T I ke ahiahi o ua la mua la o ka hebedoma, ua paniia na puka, ma kahi i akoakoa ai na haumana, no ka makau i na lu- daio ; hele mai la o lesu a ku iho la iwaena, i mai la ia lakou, Aloha oukou.

text_en: And when he had so said, he shewed unto them his hands and his side. Then were the disciples glad when they saw the Lord.
text_haw: A pau kana olelo ana i ke- ia, hoike mai la ia lakou i kona mau lima, a me kona aoao. Ala- ila olioli iho la na haumana i ko lakou ike ana i ka Haku.

text_en: Then said Jesus, to them again, Peace be unto you : as my Father hath sent me, even so send I you. 96 wahine, no ke aha la oe e nwe ai ? ia wai la oe e imi nei ? Manao iho la ia, o ka mea ia tana i malama ka mala, i aku la ia ia, E ka Haku, ina ua la- we aku oe ia ia, e hai mai oe ia'u i kahi i waiho ai oe ia ia, o na'u no ia e lawe aku.
text_haw: Olelo hou aku la no o le- su ia lakou, Aloha oukou : like me ka Makua i hoouna mai ai ia'u, pela hoi au e hoouna aku ai ia oukou. lOANE.

text_en: And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and saith unto them, Receive ye the Holy Ghost.
text_haw: A pau kana olelo ana i ke- ia, ha iho la oia ia lakou, i mai la ia lakou, E loaa ia oukou ka Uhane Hemolele.

text_en: Whose soever sins ye re- mit, they are remitted unto
text_haw: O ka hewa o na mea a ou- kou e kala aku ai, e kalaia no them; and whose soever sins lakou;; a o ka hewa o na mea ye retain, they are retained.

text_en: IT But Thomas, one of the twelve, called Didymus, was not with them when Jesus came.
text_haw: 1F Okekahi o ka poe umi- kumalua, o Toma, i kapaia o Didumo, aole ia me lakou, i ka wa i hele mai ai o lesu.

text_en: The-other disciples there- fore said unto him, We have seen the Lordl But he said unto them> Except I shall: see in his hands the print of the nails, and put my finger into the print of the nails, and thrust my hand into his- side, I will not believe.
text_haw: I aku la> keia poe hauma- na ia ia, Ua ike makou i ka Haku. I mai la oia ia lakou, ike ole au i na puka o na kui ma kona mau lima, a e o i ko'u manamana lima ma ka pu- ka o na kui, a e o hoi i ko'u lima ma kona aoao ; aole loa au e manaoio*

text_en: U And after eight days again his disciples were within, with them: then the doors being and Thomas came Jesus, shut, and stood in the midst, and said, Peace be unto you.
text_haw: 1F A po awalu ae la, malo- ko hou kana poe h&umana, a o Toma kekahi me lakou. A ua paniia na puka, hele mai la o lesu, a ku mai la iwaena, i mai la, Aloha oukou.

text_en: Then saith he to Thomas, Reach hither thy finger, and behold my hands ; and reach hither thy hand, and thrust it into my side ; and be not faith- less, but believing.
text_haw: Alaila i mai la oia ia To- ma, E o mai i kou manamana lima maanei, a e nana i ko'u mau lima ; a e hou iho ma kuu aoao: a mai noho a kanalua, aka, e manaoio.

text_en: And Thomas answered and said unto him, My Lord and my God.
text_haw: Olelo aku la o Toma ia ia, i aku la, E ko'u Haku, a me ko'u Akua.

text_en: Jesus saith unto him, Thomas, because thou hast seen me, thou hast believed : blessed are they that have not seen, and yet have believed.
text_haw: Olelo mai la o lesu ia ia, No kou ike maka ana mai ia'u, ua manaoio oe ; pomaikai ka poe ike maka ole, a manaoio hoi.

text_en: There were together Simon Peter, and Thomas called Didy- mus, and Nathanael of Cana in Galilee, and the sons of Zebe- dee, and two other of his disci- ples.
text_haw: Noho pu iho la o Simoua Petero me Toma i kapaia o Didumo. a me Natanaela no Kana i Galilaia, a me na keiki a Zebedaio, a me na mea e ae elua o kana poe haumana.

text_en: Simon Peter saith unto them, I go a fishing. They say unto him, We also go with thee. They went forth, and entered into a ship immediately ; and that night they caught nothing.
text_haw: I aku la o Simona Petero ia lakou, E hele ana au i ka lawa- ia; I mai lakou ia ia, O makou kekahi e hele pu me oe. Hele aku 1 akou, a ee koke ae a i ka moku ; aohe mea i loaa ia lakou ia po.

text_en: But when the morning was now come, Jesus stood on the shore ; but the disciples knew not that it was Jesus.
text_haw: A ao ae la, ku mai la o lesu ma ke kapa ; aole nae i ike na haumana o lesu ia.

text_en: Then Jesus saith unto them, Children, have ye any meat ? They answered him, No.
text_haw: Alaila ninau mai ia o lesu ia lakou, E na pokii, aole a ou- kou wahi ia? I aku la lakou ia ia, Aole.

text_en: And he said unto them, Cast the net on the right side of the ship, and ye shall find. They cast therefore, and now they were not able to draw it for the multitude of fishes. 98 M neia oia i hoike ai.
text_haw: I mai la oia ia lakou, E kuu aku i ka upena ma ka aoao akau o ka moku, a e loaa ia oukou. No ia mea kuu iho la lakou, aole i hiki ia lakou ke huki mai ia i ka nui loa o na ia.

text_en: Therefore that disciple whom Jesus loved saith unto a lesu i aloha ai Peter, It is the Lord. Now when Simon, Peter heard that it was the Lord, he girt his fisher's coat unto him, (for he was naked,) and did cast him- self into the sea.
text_haw: Alaila i aku la ka haumana ka Haku ia. A ia Petero, O lohe ae la o Simona Petero, o ka Haku ia, kaei ae la ia i ke kapa, no ka mea, ua olohelohe ia, a lele iho la i ka inoanawaL .

text_en: As soon then as they were come to land, they saw a fire of coals there, and fish laid there-
text_haw: A-pac lakou i uka. ike aku la lakou i.ka lanahu ahi, a me ka ia i kauia maluna, a me ka on, and bread. berena.

text_en: This is now the third time rnai la hi lakou, a me ka ia no hoi.
text_haw: O ke kolu keia o ko lesu that Jesus shewed himself to hoike ana ia ia iho i kana poe his disciples, after that he was haumana, mahope iho o kona risen from the dead. ala hou ana ae mai ka make

text_en: He saith unto him again the second time, Simon, son of o Jonas, lovest thou me? He saith unto him, Yea, Lord : thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my sheep.
text_haw: Ninau hou maila oiaiaia,. ka lua ia, E': Simona na lona? ke aloha mai nei anei oe ia'u ?* I- aku la kela, Ae, e ka Hakur ua ike no oe, ua aloha au ia oe. I mai la oia ia ia, E.hanai oe \ ka'u poe hipa.

text_en: He saith unto him the third time, Simon son of Jonas, lovest thou me ? Peter was grieved because he said unto him the third time, Lovest thou me ? And he said unto him, Lord, thou knowest all ihings; thou knowest that I love thee. Jesus said unto him, Feed my sheep.
text_haw: Ninau hou mai la o lesu ia ia, o ke kolu ia, E Simona na; lona, ke aloha mai nei anei oe ia'u ? Kaurnaha iho la o Petero?, no ke kolu o kona ninau ana ia ia, Ke aloha mai riei anei oe ia'u ? A i aku la kela ia ia, E ka Haku, ua ike oe i na rnea a pau, ua ike hot oe, ua aloha au ia oe. I mai la o lesu ia ia, E hanai oe i ka'u poe hipa.

text_en: Verily, verily, I say unto thee when thou wast young, thou girdest thyself, and walk- edst whither thou wouldest ; but when thou shalt be old, thou shalt stretch forth thy hands, and another shall gird thee, and carry thee whither thou wouldest not.
text_haw: Oiaio, he oiaio ka'u e ole- lo aku nei ia oe, i kou wa opio- pio, kaei oe ia oe iho, a hele aku la i kau wahi i makemake ai ; aka, i kou wa elemakule e kikoo aku oe i kou mau lima, a na hai oe e kaei mai, a e alakai aku i kahi au e makemake ole ai.

text_en: This spake he signifying by what death he should glorify God. And when he had spo- ken this, he saith unto him, Follow me.
text_haw: O keia kana i olelo mai ai e hoike aku ana i ke ano o ka make e hoomaikai aku ai oia i ke Akua. A pau kana olelo ana i keia, i mai la oia ia ia, E hahai mai oe ia'u.

text_en: Then Peter, turning about, seeth the disciple whom Jesus loved, following ; (which also leaned on his breast at supper, 100 nui mai nei kou albha ia'ii i ko keia poe 1 I aku la kela ia ia, Ae, e ka Huku, ua ike no oe, ua aloha au ia oe. I mai la ok ia ia, E hanaroe i na kei- kihipa a'u.
text_haw: Haliu ae la o Petero, a ike mai la i ka haumana a lesu i aloha ai e hahai mai ana, (oia hoi ka mea i hilinai ma ka poli and said, Lord, which is he • that betrayeth thee ?)

text_en: Peter seeing him, saith to Jesus, Lord, and what shall this man do.
text_haw: Ike ae la oPeteroiaia, ni- nau aku la ia lesu, E ka Haku, e aha hoi o ia nei?

text_en: Then went this saying abroad among the brethren, that that disciple should not die: yet Jesus said not unto him, He shall not die ; but, If I will that he tarry till I come, what is that to thee ?
text_haw: Nolaila, laha aku la ia ole- lo iwaena o na hoahanau, aole e make keia hoahanau. Aole nae o lesu i olelo aku ia ia, aole ia e make ; aka, Ina ma- kemake au e noho ia a hoi hou mai au, he mea aha ia ia oe 1

text_en: This is the disciple which testifieth of these things, and wrote these things: and we know that his testimony is true.
text_haw: O keia ka haumana e hoi- ke aku no keia mau mea, a kakau hoi ia mau mea, a ua ike makou he oiaio kana hoike ana.

text_en: And there are also many other things which Jesus did, the which, if they should be written every one, I suppose that even the world itself could not contain the books that should be written. Amen. 9* o lesu i ka ahaaina, a ninau aku la, E ka Haku, owai ka mea nana oe e kumakaia ?)
text_haw: He nui loa na mea e ae a tesu i hana'i, ina e pau ia mau mea i ka palapalaia, ke manao nei au, aole wahi kaawale ma ao nei no na buke e palapa- laia.
